items.description:

Most systems use JSON.

items.title: contrast()
items.description: The contrast() filter function increases or decreases the contrast of an element. contrast() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

items.title: contrast-color()
items.description: The contrast-color() function takes a <color> and returns either black or white, whichever is the most contrasting color for that value. contrast-color() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.
